testcase.name: ClickedOn3rdMobile

failure.message: expected [Motorola G57 Power 5G (Fluidity, 8GB RAM, 128GB Storage)| Snapdragon 6s Gen 4 Processor | 6.72" FHD+ Display | 50MP LYT-600 + 8MP Ultrawide | 8MP Selfie Camera | 7000mAh Battery, 33W TurboPowe | IP64] but found [Motorola G57 Power 5G (Fluidity, 8GB RAM, 128GB Storage)| Snapdragon 6s Gen 4 Processor | 6.72" FHD+ Display | 50MP LYT-600 + 8MP Ultrawide | 8MP Selfie Camera | 7000mAh Battery, 33W TurboPower | IP64]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Motorola G57 Power 5G (Fluidity, 8GB RAM, 128GB Storage)| Snapdragon 6s Gen 4 Processor | 6.72" FHD+ Display | 50MP LYT-600 + 8MP Ultrawide | 8MP Selfie Camera | 7000mAh Battery, 33W TurboPowe | IP64] but found [Motorola G57 Power 5G (Fluidity, 8GB RAM, 128GB Storage)| Snapdragon 6s Gen 4 Processor | 6.72" FHD+ Display | 50MP LYT-600 + 8MP Ultrawide | 8MP Selfie Camera | 7000mAh Battery, 33W TurboPower | IP64] at Utilities.AsserionsClass.assertionString(AsserionsClass.java:15) at pages.MobileSectionPage.AssertClickOnThirdMobile(MobileSectionPage.java:56) at tests.MobileAddToCart_TC_01.ClickedOn3rdMobile(MobileAddToCart_TC_01.java:35) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 31 stack frames
